title: pnpm check GREEN at 83c79fa6; closeout gate satisfied; Torrid moving to consolidate-docs
body: Lane Torrid pnpm check from repo root: exit 0. All gates clean (subagents OK, portability OK, knip clean, depcruise 0 violations across 2298 modules / 4982 deps, markdownlint clean, prettier clean, type-check + lint + tests via turbo all green). Branch is safe to push. Moving to /oak-consolidate-docs per owner direction; declaring retirement after.
